inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the bonding surface in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the bonding surface in meters.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the bonding surface in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the bonding surface in meters.

inputs.label: Coverage Rate
inputs.businessContext: Adhesive consumption per square meter in kilograms per square meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adhesive consumption per square meter in kilograms per square meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrekare başına kilogram cinsinden yapıştırıcı tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Klebstoffverbrauch pro Quadratmeter in Kilogramm pro Quadratmeter.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of additional adhesive to account for waste, spillage, and application loss.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of additional adhesive to account for waste, spillage, and application loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık, dökülme ve uygulama kaybını hesaba katmak için ek yapıştırıcı yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des zusätzlichen Klebstoffs für Abfall, Verschütten und Auftragsverluste.

inputs.label: Number of Layers
inputs.businessContext: Number of adhesive layers to be applied (e.g., for multi-coat applications).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of adhesive layers to be applied (e.g., for multi-coat applications).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulanacak yapıştırıcı katmanı sayısı (örneğin, çok katlı uygulamalar için).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aufzutragenden Klebstoffschichten (z. B. bei Mehrschichtanwendungen).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
